## What this changes

A sentence or two on what's different and why.

## How to verify

- [ ] `./scripts/ai-check.sh` is green
- [ ] If this changes the renderer: snapshot goldens were re-recorded intentionally (delete + re-run, see TESTING.md)
- [ ] If this changes the file format: a `.tiramisu` saved in `main` still loads
- [ ] If this changes UI: tested by hand, screenshot below

<!-- Drag-and-drop screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Notes for reviewers

Anything subtle, intentional, or "yes I know this looks weird" — flag it here.
